max_share_constraint: <= 0.40 satisfied; all 4 positions used (>=6 MCQs requirement met)
option_length_balance: Within-question option lengths held within ~+/-20% of the per-question mean; the correct (=) option is NOT systematically the longest. Longest-option-is-correct count = 1 of 6 (q1), below chance, so no exploitable length-bias signal.

questions.objective_ref: Explain in plain language what prompt injection is and why it is possible.
Describe why the AI cannot reliably tell its trusted instructions apart from untrusted user input (system prompt + user input share one context window).
Recognise the classic 'ignore previous instructions' attack and walk through what it does.
Tell the difference between direct prompt injection and indirect prompt injection.
List the real-world impacts of a successful injection and name a few beginner-level defenses.
State how prompt injection differs from a jailbreak (from 5.5).
